footer.aboutBody: We always take technology and quality as our core values. With experienced R&D and production teams plus strict ISO quality control, we deliver reliable bearings and supporting solutions.
footer.copyright: © 2026 - Shanghai Synergy Industrial Co., Ltd. all rights reserved.

about.introP: Synergy is your trusted partner in industrial power and motion. Since our inception in 1997 at the Shanghai International Electromechanical Hardware Mall, we have evolved from a trading company specializing in premium Japanese bearings into an industry leader that integrates Research & Development (R&D), manufacturing, and professional services.To respond to market demands with greater agility, we established modern production bases in Shandong and Ningbo in 2007. Leveraging our exceptional manufacturing capabilities, Synergy has earned the profound trust of the international giant JTEKT (Koyo), becoming an authorized manufacturer and distributor for their ball bearings, roller bearings, and related products.We deliver more than just products—we deliver value. With over 30 years of deep industry expertise, Synergy is dedicated to safeguarding our customers' operations through precise technical solutions and worry-free after-sales support.Our MissionLean Operations: Continuously optimizing business processes to drive a dual boost in sales and service efficiency.Cost Reduction & Efficiency: Reducing equipment downtime through high-reliability products, significantly lowering our customers' Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).Global Vision: Expanding our global growth footprint through forward-looking innovation and strong strategic partnerships.

services.title: Quality: ISO Standards
services.html: From raw material selection to final inspection, every step follows international ISO quality standards with zero-defect delivery as our goal.

services.title: Products: Full Bearing Range
services.html: Deep groove ball bearings, taper roller bearings, hub bearings, pillow block bearings and more — serving automotive, engineering machinery and industrial equipment.

services.title: Engineering: Expert Selection
services.html: Our experienced engineers provide one-on-one bearing selection guidance and custom solutions to match your operating conditions and reduce downtime.

services.title: Service: Global After-Sales
services.html: 365-day technical support with fast response, backed by production bases in Shandong and Ningbo for efficient global delivery and reliable after-sales service.

teamCase.body: Synergy bearings are widely used in passenger and commercial vehicle hub systems, engineering machinery undercarriages, industrial reducers and agricultural transmission components. With high-speed stability, impact resistance and long service life, our products provide reliable power transmission and rotational support, helping customers improve efficiency and lower total cost of ownership.

testimonial.quote: We have partnered with Synergy for years. Their bearings deliver outstanding durability and consistency, with fast delivery and professional technical support — a trusted long-term supplier in our supply chain.
testimonial.author: Mr. Zhang
